issues.description: Effect is missing the condition 'If you have no other [Black Maria] Characters' — this is a mandatory prerequisite for activation
Action sequence incomplete: missing Rest action after GiveDon, and missing the delayed return-to-deck action that occurs 'at the end of this turn'

GiveDon should attach DON cards to field and rest them immediately; the second part (returning DON at end of turn) requires a separate effect with EndOfTurn trigger and conditional logic to match opponent's DON count
Missing duration/timing for the return-to-deck effect: should be a second effect with trigger EndOfTurn that executes after the initial GiveDon+Rest
